text: Let's travel all through the worldwide seas,
If you've made up your mind, let the signal for departure
We were able to escape from the set course
along the boundary between sky and sea.
to a hidden adventure at the dark bottom of the sea.
Doesn't it sound fun just thinking about it?
Let's travel all through the worldwide seas,
If you've made up your mind, let the signal for departure
That feeling we had when we set sail
nothing will be able to scare me...
Now, as the trip approaches, our racing heartbeats
engrave a rhythm of adventure in our shy hearts.
Give them all out at a big party
Fill your empty heart with dreams.
If you color your heart with the blowing wind
Give them all out at a big party
{\fad(2000,2000)}The Invisible Man and\Nthe Secret of the Mansion!

name: Nami
text: We were traveling and lost our way!

name: Usopp
text: That's weird, the inside looks like a tunnel.

name: Chopper
text: I can see a courtyard on the other side.

name: Nami
text: If we go back, the zombies'll get us.

name: Chopper
text: Look, a light just went on!

name: Usopp
text: Actually, it's more of a spotlight.

name: Usopp
text: Ow, are you only aiming at me?!

name: Cindry
text: You aren't allowed in the mansion.

name: Cindry
text: You two over there can come in.

name: Hogback
text: Can't you make just one exception, Cindry-chan?

name: Hogback
text: I'm sorry for scaring you like that.

name: Hogback
text: Long ago, in order to test the love of her rich fiancé,

name: Hogback
text: This woman broke all of his expensive china plates,

name: Hogback
text: and was chased off and led a horrible life.

name: Hogback
text: And I still haven't introduced myself...

name: Hogback
text: I am the world-renowned Doctor Hogback!

name: Hogback
text: I told you to stop that!

name: Hogback
text: You're supposed to listen to what I have to say!

name: Cindry
text: I wish plates would disappear from this world.

name: Hogback
text: I really do understand, but right now I'm trying to talk!

name: Usopp
text: That's the guy you wanted to...

name: Cindry
text: Well, we can continue this inside.

name: Cindry
text: We can make an exception and allow all three of you in.

name: Usopp
text: I don't understand why I couldn't go in...

name: Nami
text: Yeah, it's at least better than the zombies.

name: Hogback
text: I'd like to welcome you to my mansion!

name: Chopper
text: I wanna talk to you later!

name: Nami
text: We were attacked by zombies in the graveyard, and we ran here! {Maybe like this: "We were attacked by zombies in the graveyard and ran here!"}

name: Usopp
text: We've seen loads of other unbelievable creatures here too!

name: Usopp
text: You live here, you should know!

name: Hogback
text: I'm glad you made it here safely.

name: Hogback
text: As for your question, here's my answer:

name: Hogback
text: I live here because I don't know what those things are.

name: Chopper
text: So, you're here to research the zombies, Doctor?!

name: Hogback
text: Humans have a horrible fear of zombies.

name: Hogback
text: But if we look at it as people coming back from the dead instead...

name: Hogback
text: Then isn't it the immortality all humans strive for?

name: Hogback
text: Everyone has one or two deceased people close to them that they wish to see again...

name: Hogback
text: With medical science, we are capable of controlling whether people live or die, fearless of the gods!

name: Hogback
text: It was for that reason I went exile to begin my research on this mysterious island.

name: Chopper
text: But if you succeed, there'll be tons of people that'll be happy!

name: Chopper
text: I'll cheer you on, Doctor Hogback!

name: Chopper
text: E-Even if you call me a doctor, I'm not happy, asshole!

name: Chopper
text: And later, can I see your lab?

name: Hogback
text: Don't you {\i1}ever{\i0} even look at my lab...!

name: Hogback
text: Oh, Cindry-chan, can't you at least put the pudding on a plate?

name: Hogback
text: Or is it hopeless to ask?!

name: Cindry
text: I wish for all plates to be gone.

name: Hogback
text: Well, don't worry, we keep the tablecloth clean just for occasions like this!

name: Nami
text: You could at least use a spoon!

name: Chopper
text: Oh! It's really sweet and good!

name: Usopp
text: You're all dirty, so you can use it.

name: Usopp
text: You didn't happen to see a weird skeleton pass by, did you?

name: Usopp
text: He's got an afro, he's real tall...

name: Usopp
text: Well, I guess it's weird enough being a walking, talking skeleton.

name: Usopp
text: Do you know anything about it?

name: Chopper
text: I don't really have any interest in seeing human women naked...

name: Chopper
text: But I do wanna sneak a peek at Doctor Hogback's lab.

name: Usopp
text: why do we have to keep watch for you like this?

name: Usopp
text: If you're that scared, you could've skipped the bath!

name: Nami
text: You know, for being grabbed by zombies like that, you two sure don't seem to care.

name: Usopp
text: We're just gonna get dirty again!

name: Usopp
text: They told us we could spend the night.

name: Usopp
text: Do you know what could happen to us if we went out tonight?!

name: Usopp
text: Anyway, we're not gonna go anywhere else.

name: Usopp
text: Luffy and the others are gonna come and save us.

name: Chopper
text: I don't wanna go back out there!

name: Chopper
text: I don't like that forest, nor the graves! {The line is too long for the sub, but how about "I don't like neither the forest, nor the graves!". Also, I believe Chopper is saying something like "Neither the forest nor the graves!", so we could use that too as continuation of the previous line.}

name: Nami
text: The inside is the same as the outside.

name: Nami
text: Have you taken a good look around?

name: Nami
text: The halls and rooms are full.

name: Nami
text: This mansion is filled with zombies.

name: Nami
text: But the most suspicious of all is Hogback himself.

name: Nami
text: If he really didn't have any connection to the zombies like he says,

name: Nami
text: why would he be living in a mansion filled with them?

name: Nami
text: So for now, we'll just pretend we don't know,

name: Absalom
text: Well, well, what a tricky girl.

name: Nami
text: Usopp, Chopper, did one of you say something?

name: Absalom
text: Compared to that woman on the ship...

name: Absalom
text: You're a lot weaker - more my type.

name: Absalom
text: You... are going to be my bride.

name: Chopper
text: Can you smell Usopp's fart in here too?

name: Chopper
text: She's right, I can smell it!

name: Usopp
text: How is the window doing that on its own?

name: Nami
text: I wonder if he got away...

name: Nami
text: He was here the whole time...
{\fad(380,600)}Meanwhile... in the Thousand Sunny\NLuffy and the Others

name: Franky
text: No matter what we do, we can't get out.

name: Zoro
text: That skeleton's ship is stuck too, just like the Sunny.

name: Zoro
text: And the Mini Merry Usopp and the others were riding is stuck here too.

name: Zoro
text: With the front gate like that, it's almost like it's calling to you.

name: Zoro
text: I can almost see all the little ghosts beckoning us in.

name: Luffy
text: What're you going on about over there, Zoro?

name: Luffy
text: If you stay here you'll just be bored.

name: Luffy
text: You can even share some of my bento! {Zoro share Luffy's bento with Luffy? -_-} {Also, it should probably be "You can even share some of my bento!", with the respective changes}

name: Sanji
text: Why are there stairs all of a sudden?

name: Sanji
text: Hell would probably be safer than this place.

name: Zoro
text: Idiot, I know it's a dog, but come on.

name: Zoro
text: It looks more like a boss or something.

name: Luffy
text: That's it, let go nice and easy...

name: Robin
text: But ignoring that, it has horrible scarring on it.

name: Robin
text: It simply remaining alive is a mystery in itself.

name: Sanji
text: It looks like a fox got mixed into it, so I doubt it's really a normal animal.

name: Luffy
text: Man, fun things are just showing up as soon as we get here, it's great!

name: Zoro
text: Having it do something like this after losing is really damaging its pride.

name: Franky
text: We left the tunnel, and now we're in a forest?

name: Luffy
text: Hey you guys, come be pirates with-

name: Hogback
text: What was that commotion just now?

name: Hogback
text: Were you in the bathing room again?

name: Absalom
text: I was looking for a bride. {you need to readd him saying hogback's name}{}{}{}

name: Hogback
text: Well, you're not getting any of the bounty money.

name: Perona
text: This time, six of them have bounties.

name: Perona
text: One of them is over 100 million,

name: Perona
text: and the captain himself is 300 million!

name: Absalom
text: The government doesn't put a bounty like that on an ordinary pirate.

name: Hogback
text: And now that we know that, we'll put all of our power into capturing them, Absalom.

name: Hogback
text: Tonight we have our work cut out for us!

name: Usopp
text: There's no such thing as an invisible man!

name: Nami
text: Didn't you see him attacking me?!

name: Usopp
text: You just want me to tell you I saw you naked so you can charge me!

name: Nami
text: Although I'm still gonna charge you.

name: Usopp
text: Anyway, I don't believe anything we've seen on this island!

name: Usopp
text: The zombies are a race of...\Nmysterious underground dwellers!

name: Usopp
text: It's true we saw a skeleton brought back to life with a devil fruit.

name: Usopp
text: That was just an exception to the rule!

name: Usopp
text: No two people can have the same devil fruit ability,

name: Usopp
text: And there's no other way people can be brought back to life!

name: Usopp
text: There's no other way something like that can happen!

name: Chopper
text: Even with medicine, there isn't any way something like that should be possible.

name: Chopper
text: Doctor Hogback is really amazing, and he's researching it.

name: Chopper
text: It's possible even something as miraculous as that is going on here!

name: Nami
text: Don't you trust him a little too much?

name: Chopper
text: Doctor Hogback is a great man!

name: Chopper
text: You're the one in the wrong!

name: Chopper
text: You're saying the doctor and the zombies are together without any proof!

name: Nami
text: I can't shake off the feeling we're being watched...

name: Nami
text: That's the room from before, right?

name: Hildon
text: The two of them have retired for the night.

name: Usopp
text: You just left us out in that graveyard earlier!

name: Hildon
text: I took the horses to go do something, and when I wasn't looking...

name: Nami
text: All of you on this island are ghouls!

name: Hildon
text: Now if you'll follow me, I'll show you your rooms...

name: Usopp
text: You're just ignoring all that, and showing us around?!

name: Nami
text: I wonder if that's really the door to hell?

name: Nami
text: We're just gonna leave now, sorry.

name: Chopper
text: Please let me talk to the doctor again first!

name: Hildon
text: Please ignore that, and I'll show you your rooms...

name: zombie
text: They've already started to figure it all out...

name: zombie
text: You're cute when you're shaking in fear!

name: Usopp
text: A zombie came out of the picture?!

name: Buhichuck
text: The leader of the zombies in this room is I, Buhichuck-sama!

name: Buhichuck
text: Don't think you'll be able to take even one step out of this room, oink!

name: zombie
text: Who just stabbed that sword in my back?

name: Usopp
text: This mansion really is filled with zombies!

name: Usopp
text: Chopper, Nami, get to the door!

name: Usopp
text: There're lots of them here too!

name: zombie
text: You won't get away from us!

name: Usopp
text: Anyway, let's get out of here!

name: Usopp
text: We'll go to a different room!

name: bikkuri zombie
text: We won't let you get away!

name: bikkuri zombie
text: Crap, they opened the secret passage!

name: bikkuri zombie
text: It's no good, it's blocked from the other side!

name: Buhichuck
text: No matter where they go in this mansion, the other Surprise Zombies are there, oink!

name: Nami
text: We need to get out of this tunnel, and stay out of rooms with paintings!

name: Nami
text: Now that I look at her again, she's really pretty...

name: Nami
text: Come on, would you really put this many pictures of yourself in your own room?

name: Chopper
text: But she had stitches all over her face and body!

name: Usopp
text: Yeah... these pictures don't show any at all.

name: Usopp
text: It can't really be a different person...

name: Nami
text: It looks like she was a really famous actress.

name: Nami
text: Look, all of these articles are about her.

name: Usopp
text: Didn't they say something earlier about her not being a servant?

name: Usopp
text: Something about breaking plates and being thrown out by her husband...

name: Nami
text: Looking at this, I just don't think something like that happened.

name: Nami
text: She was born into a rich family...

name: Nami
text: She was very popular ever since she was a child...

name: Usopp
text: W-W-What the hell are you talking about?!

name: Chopper
text: But if that report really is true,

name: Chopper
text: that means she already died once and came back to life!

name: Chopper
text: On this island... those were all real zombies...

name: Chopper
text: What we saw... really were living dead!

name: Usopp
text: This is just getting even creepier!

name: Usopp
text: I wish I hadn't known tha-

name: Nami
text: Please open it up for me?

name: bikkuri zombie
text: Sorry, this isn't where we keep the treasure!

name: Nami
text: "This isn't where we keep the treasure."

name: Nami
text: That's what that jack-in-the-box zombie said.

name: Ryuuma
text: It seems as if there are people lost in this mansion.

name: Sanji
text: You need to stop trying to make everything your friend!

name: Sanji
text: Our crew already has weird shit like a raccoon dog and a robot!

name: Sanji
text: What matters is that you aren't human!

name: Sanji
text: No, your base was a pervert!

name: Franky
text: Oh, well, if you say it that way...

name: Robin
text: About that tree person and that unicorn...

name: Robin
text: All of the strange animals we've seen in this forest have similar characteristics...

name: Robin
text: And a number tattooed onto them.

name: Zoro
text: I guess it does have one.

name: Zoro
text: So you mean someone's doing this to them?

name: Luffy
text: I'll catch one for a pet!

name: Franky
text: So they can phase through things...

name: Franky
text: This week's me is just completely worthless. {Should it really remain "This week's me", instead of "This week I'm"?}

name: Franky
text: No matter what I do, I fail.

name: Franky
text: I don't have the will to live...

name: Franky
text: I can hear the whole world booing at me...

name: Sanji
text: Why are you getting so depressed?!

name: Luffy
text: If I were to be reborn,

name: Luffy
text: I want to be a shellfish.

name: Luffy
text: I wish there was a hole I could be buried in...

name: Sanji
text: Really, what the hell are you guys doing?!

name: Robin
text: Perhaps if you're touched by the ghosts, then you have feelings of worthlessness?

name: Zoro
text: They never try their hardest anyway,

name: Zoro
text: So these ghosts are able to play games with their hearts.

name: Zoro
text: I'm sorry I was ever born...

name: Sanji
text: It seems it's just like Robin-chan said.

name: Robin
text: Even without physical body, they're still able to cause such emotional distress with a simple touch.

name: Robin
text: If they are our enemies, they're very strong.

name: Robin
text: This really is a mysterious island.

name: Luffy
text: Oh, next time I see those ghosts, I'm not holding back!

name: Luffy
text: And I won't get one as a pet, I don't want it!

name: Franky
text: This time, I'll get rid of 'em!

name: Sanji
text: Damn, that was just too funny!

name: Robin
text: The patchwork animals with numbers may very well be created...

name: Robin
text: But those ghosts seem to be something entirely different.

name: Sanji
text: Those guys were on the boat too.

name: Sanji
text: I get the feeling they're showing up every once in a while just to spy on us...

name: Sanji
text: So the question is, who's behind all of this?

name: Luffy
text: Hey, let's eat our bento here!

name: Sanji
text: Idiot, if you eat it here, the food will taste nasty!

name: zombie
text: Why the hell would I wanna go back?!

name: Luffy
text: Is it a badly injured old guy?

name: zombie
text: We'll show you how dangerous zombies really are!

name: Luffy
text: Then we'll show you just how dangerous we are.

name: Luffy
text: What are you guys doing here?

name: Zombies
text: No, no! We're not! We're sorry!

name: Luffy
text: Have a man with a long nose...

name: Luffy
text: and a reindeer-like raccoon dog passed through here?

name: Zombie
text: We have orders not to give anyone information like that.

name: Luffy
text: Oh? So you absolutely won't tell us?

name: Zombie
text: Eh?! Don't sell out a friend!

name: Zombie
text: You're the one that tried to bite them!

name: Luffy
text: It looks like they headed towards that mansion.

name: Luffy
text: Though we still don't know about Brook...

name: Old Man
text: Would you listen to my story for a moment?

name: All
text: We told you, he's a zombie!

name: Old Man
text: No, I'm a badly wounded old man.

name: All
text: You're too easy to confuse! We'll just call you a zombie!

name: Old Man
text: There's a man I want you to beat.

name: Old Man
text: I know you guys can do it!

name: Old Man
text: There are so many victims... if he was defeated they would all be saved.

name: Old Man
text: I would be so grateful if I got my shadow back.

name: Luffy
text: It's true! You're missing your shadow too, old man? {Can reorder the sentence to "Old man, you're missing your shadow too?"}

name: Zoro
text: Is it someone on this island?

name: Robin
text: I know his name very well.

name: Robin
text: He's a man whose former bounty exceeds even yours, Luffy...!

name: Robin
text: one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea!
